creator: alexis.praga@proton.me
text:
Good catch, I did not test on 12.3. It looks like 13.1 does not have this issue (and does not need the patch).

Upstream does not want to patch as it should be done on our end. See discussion here : https://github.com/kovidgoyal/kitty/pull/5398

So you can close the issue and we'll leave the patch...
